# AUTOPILOT STATE
# Auto-generated by /gsd-autopilot start
# Location: .planning/AUTOPILOT-STATE.md
# This file is the single source of truth for the autopilot agent.

---

## Run Status

```yaml
status: pending              # pending | running | paused | completed | failed
started_at: null
paused_at: null
current_phase: null
total_phases: null
spec_file: null
project_name: null
```

---

## Phase Tracker

```yaml
phases:
  # Populated at init from ROADMAP.md
  # Each phase entry follows this structure:
  #
  #   N:
  #     name: "Phase name from roadmap"
  #     status: pending
  #     step: null
  #     started_at: null
  #     completed_at: null
  #     blocked_reason: null
  #     plans_total: null
  #     plans_completed: null
  #     plans_deepened: null
  #     verification_result: null
  #     notes: ""
```

---

## Human Gates

```yaml
gates:
  # Pre-declared gates populated from spec at init.
  # Discovered gates added during execution.
  # Each gate follows this structure:
  #
  #   GATE-NNN:
  #     phase: N
  #     type: external-action | approval | quality-check | decision
  #     summary: "Brief description"
  #     detail: |
  #       Full description of what's needed.
  #     status: pending | blocked | resolved
  #     blocked_at: null
  #     resolved_at: null
  #     resolution: null

next_gate_id: 1
```

---

## Skip-Ahead Log

```yaml
skip_decisions: []
  # Each entry follows this structure:
  #
  #   - timestamp: ISO-8601
  #     blocked_phase: N
  #     blocked_by: "GATE-NNN"
  #     skipped_to: M
  #     rationale: |
  #       Why this skip is safe.
  #     work_completed_while_skipped: []
  #     returned_to_blocked: false
```

---

## Execution Log

```yaml
log: []
  # Append-only. Each entry:
  #
  #   - timestamp: ISO-8601
  #     action: "init | plan-phase | deepen-plan | execute-plan | verify-work | gate-blocked | gate-resolved | skip-ahead | pause | resume | complete | error"
  #     phase: N (if applicable)
  #     plan: "N.X" (if applicable)
  #     detail: "Human-readable description of what happened"
```

---

## Resume Queue

```yaml
resume_queue: []
  # Populated when gates block phases. Processed on /gsd-autopilot resume.
  # Each entry:
  #
  #   - phase: N
  #     resume_from: "planning | deepening | executing | verifying"
  #     gate_resolved: "GATE-NNN"
  #     priority: 1  # lower = higher priority. Blocked phases get priority 1.
```
